notes: Sizes are in bytes. Checksums are SHA-256. Regenerate with scripts/compute-hashes.sh after exporting.

models.name: toxicity
models.description: Multilingual toxicity classifier, 104 languages (DistilBERT, FP32 — INT8 quantization drops borderline-toxic scores below usable thresholds).

models.name: embedding
models.description: Multilingual sentence embeddings for semantic harm-category classification + Pro custom-blocklist semantic rules, 100+ languages (e5-base / XLM-RoBERTa, 768-dim, FP32).

models.name: embedding_spm
models.description: SentencePiece BPE model for the e5-base / XLM-RoBERTa tokenizer.

models.name: vocab
models.description: Legacy WordPiece vocabulary kept for backward compatibility; e5-base uses the SentencePiece companion above.

models.name: prompt_injection
models.description: Prompt injection / jailbreak binary classifier (DeBERTa v3, FP32; INT8 corrupts DeBERTa disentangled attention).

models.name: spm
models.description: SentencePiece Unigram model for the DeBERTa v3 prompt injection tokenizer.

models.name: pii_ner
models.description: Multilingual PII NER, 20 entity types (XLM-RoBERTa, FP32 only). Marked 'large' so the library gates its auto-download behind an explicit opt-in.

models.name: pii_spm
models.description: SentencePiece BPE model for the XLM-RoBERTa PII NER tokenizer.
